owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

addBatchEvent(uint256,uint8,string,strin.notice: Add a new event to a batch. Only members of the batch can add events to the batch.

addBatchEventDetail(uint256,string,strin.notice: Add a new detail to a batch event. Only members of the batch can add details to the event.

createBatch(uint256,uint256,uint8,bytes3.notice: Create a new batch for a product. Only the workspace owner of the product can create a batch.

getBatch(uint256).notice: Get batch details by batch ID

getBatchEvent(uint256).notice: Get batch event details by event ID

getBatchEventDetail(uint256).notice: Get batch event detail by detail ID

setInviteManager(address).notice: Set the invite manager address. Can only be set once by the contract owner.

setSupplier(uint256,address).notice: Set the supplier for a batch. Only the InviteManager can set the supplier.

setTransporter(uint256,address).notice: Set the transporter for a batch. Only the InviteManager can set the transporter.

updateSupplierAssignmentStatus(uint256,u.notice: Update the supplier assignment status of a batch. Only owners of the batch can update the status.

updateTransporterAssignmentStatus(uint25.notice: Update the transporter assignment status of a batch. Only owners of the batch can update the status.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (uint256) view external returns (struct IWorkspaceManager.Workspace memory)

documentation.text: @notice Set the invite manager address. Can only be set once by the contract owner.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (uint256) view external returns (struct IProductManager.ProductWorkspace memory)

documentation.text: @notice Create a new batch for a product. Only the workspace owner of the product can create a batch.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (uint256) view external returns (struct IWorkspaceManager.Workspace memory)
literal_string "Only workspace owner can perform this action"

arguments.value: Only workspace owner can perform this action

argumentTypes.typeString: literal_string "Only workspace owner can perform this action"

documentation.text: @notice Update the supplier assignment status of a batch. Only owners of the batch can update the status.
@notice Update the transporter assignment status of a batch. Only owners of the batch can update the status.
@notice Set the supplier for a batch. Only the InviteManager can set the supplier.
@notice Set the transporter for a batch. Only the InviteManager can set the transporter.
@notice Add a new event to a batch. Only members of the batch can add events to the batch.
@notice Add a new detail to a batch event. Only members of the batch can add details to the event.
@notice Get batch details by batch ID
@notice Get batch event details by event ID
@notice Get batch event detail by detail ID
